Link Directory

A list of other websites that I think are worth sharing. This part of the site is probably going to be a constant work-in-progress, so expect new links to be added/reorganized as time goes on.

Links marked with a "⭐" are personal favorites of mine.

Table of Contents
  • Webmastery
  • Libraries / Archives
  • Mental Health
  • Fun
  • Miscellaneous

Webmastery

Some resources to help you make the most out of your website!

View Webmastery Links

Libraries / Archives

On the off chance any bootlickers are visiting my site: all of these links are DMCA-compliant. If you try to accuse me of "piracy" for linking to public and freely available digital archives and libraries, I have no respect for you whatsoever.

  • Anna's Archive - Digital library and search engine.
  • Archive.org
  • Flashpoint Archive - Massive archive of flash games and animations.
  • My Abandonware - Abandonware games.
  • Queer Liberation Library

Mental Health

  • DBT.tools - Dialectical behavior therapy info and worksheets.
  • Therapistaid.com - Worksheets for various therapy types.
  • The Trauma and Dissociation Library

Fun

Links relating to hobbies, games, toys, and other fun stuff!

View Fun Links

Miscellaneous

Links that don't fit into any other category, or that I'm just to lazy to categorize.

  • Abortion resources
  • Catcolours.com - An extensive cat color reference archive.
  • Does the Dog Die? - Trigger warnings for movies, TV, books, video games and more.
  • Ezgif - online GIF editor and converter.
  • Feedbro - My feed reader of choice.
  • The Gender Dysphoria Bible
  • iNaturalist
  • The Lost Media Wiki
    • The Lost Media Wiki Forums
  • MyFridgeFood - Give you recipes using ingredients that you already have in your kitchen.
  • MyNoise - Customizable soundscapes.
  • Openverse - Search engine for openly licensed and public domain works.
  • Pronoun Dressing Room
  • WhoSampled
  • Wiby.me - Search engine for "older style pages". Good for finding other small/indie websites and older websites that are (somehow) still up.

Page last updated April 18, 2025.

Unless stated otherwise, www.sainthood.xyz is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
